parserEntityIdentity.createUpdateDeleteKeyConstruction: packet entity stream delta-decodes an entity index; CREATE additionally reads a 17-bit serial
parserEntityIdentity.generationIncrementRules: not inferred by parser; serial is read from CREATE and stored on Entity
parserEntityIdentity.indexReuseBehavior: registerEntity replaces existing byIndex slot and updates class index

evidence: Demo.getEntityByHandle masks handle & 0x3FFF, ignoring serial for lookup.
Packet CREATE reads classId then a 17-bit serial; UPDATE/LEAVE/DELETE only delta-decode an index.
